name: UBA : High Risk User Access to Critical Asset
notes: Detects when a user involved in incidents (offenses) access to critical asset.
conditions_text: when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : High Risk Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
TD_list: APPLY UBA : High Risk User Access to Critical Asset on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:UBA : Common Event Filters
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:CategoryDefinition: Authentication Success
AND when any of Username are contained in any of UBA : High Risk Users - AlphaNumeric (Ignore Case)
AND when any of Destination IP are contained in any of Critical Assets - IP
RED_list: Event name: UBA : High Risk User Access to Critical Asset
